title: SWIMMING LOCATIONS - 211info
text: HIGH DESERT SWIMMING POOL SWIMMING LOCATIONS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Provides a public swimming space. 1000 Oregon Avenue Burns, OR 97720 Eligibility: Unrestricted Hours: General Swim: 7 days a week 1pm-4:30pm and 7pm-9pm Email Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Walk in. Call to verify there is not a swim meet. FEES: Daily Rate: Ages 18 and older: $4 Ages 6-17: $3 Ages 0-5: $2 Visit website for seasonal and multi-use pass rates DOCUMENTS: None AREA SERVED: Harney County SITE HOURS: Monday-Friday 1pm-4:30pm 7pm-9pm, Saturday/Sunday 1pm-5pm Services: Extreme Heat Swimming Facilities If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service.
